sourceAmbiguity: The blueprint requires submission to IdentityBindingAuthority but does not define behavior when the authority seam is unavailable.
decisionTaken: When seeded thresholds pass but authority submission is unavailable, the decision downgrades to telephony_verified_challenge with no local binding mutation.
whyThisFitsTheBlueprint: The pipeline remains useful without silently caching a local IdentityBinding or widening seeded continuation authority.
operationalRisk: A caller may receive challenge continuation or manual handling instead of seeded continuation during authority outage.
followUpIfPolicyChanges: Introduce an append-only authority retry outbox only if it cannot create a local binding or seeded grant before settlement.
